nasb.text: Then David left his baggage in the care of the baggage keeper, and ran to the battle line and entered in order to greet his brothers.

esv.text: And David left the things in charge of the keeper of the baggage and ran to the ranks and went and greeted his brothers.

cnv.text: 大衛把身上的東西留在看守物件的人手中，跑到戰陣上去，向他的哥哥們問安。

ccb.text: 大卫把带来的东西交给负责看守的人保管，自己跑到阵中去问候哥哥们。
